active_target.live_context_source: none — no live context was supplied to this gate

extraction_analysis.attacker_gain: unknown — no selector or value-moving path identified
extraction_analysis.why_gain_exceeds_entitlement: cannot be assessed without a confirmed code path

gate_question: Does this exact current protocol, with current live state, allow an unprivileged attacker to extract funds or rewards beyond entitlement?
live_preconditions: At least one public value-moving selector (withdraw, sweep, claim, transfer, etc.) must exist in the contract bytecode — not yet confirmed
That selector must lack caller authentication or use a bypassable check — not yet confirmed
The reported token balance (~$538B nominal) must be real and not locked by a time-lock, multisig, or external constraint — not yet confirmed
The balance must be attributable to user deposits or a reward pool, not a custodial/escrow position that is not extractable by a third party — not yet confirmed
rejection_reason: Five hard gates fail simultaneously, blocking promotion to NEEDS_LOCAL_PROOF. (1) exact_code_path_or_selector_exists is false: verified_source is null, no ABI exists, and no bytecode decompilation has been run — no public value-moving selector has been identified. (2) live_state_supports_preconditions is false: no live context was provided to this gate; the triage stage returned NEEDS_LIVE_CONTEXT but that context was never collected. (3) attacker_controls_trigger is false: without a known selector there is no confirmed trigger the attacker can invoke. (4) concrete_fund_or_reward_gain is false: the $538B figure has FDV=0, liquidity=0, and volume=0, which is inconsistent with a live extractable pool; the token identity and real extractable value are unconfirmed. (5) gain_is_beyond_entitlement is false: entitlement cannot be calculated without source or selectors. Per HUNT_PLAN.md Hard Stop, a candidate must not be promoted unless a reproducible path, an unprivileged attacker, and a concrete gain beyond entitlement are all proven. None of those conditions are met. Resubmit after completing the five live-context steps listed in the triage output: bytecode/selector extraction, token balance breakdown, deployer and creation-tx lookup, proxy/implementation check, and recent transaction history.
